arts.ttl: Lazio vs. Lecce, between Europe and survival
arts.sum: Lazio have won their last two Serie A games against Lecce and have not achieved three consecutive wins against them in the competition since between 2001 and 2004, when they collected four victories in a row under Alberto Zaccheroni first and then Roberto Mancini. Lazio have faced Lecce 17 times at home in Serie A, losing only once (W11 D5); the Biancocelesti have had fewer home defeats against teams they have faced at least 15 times at home in the competition only against Empoli (W11 D4).

arts.ttl: Preview: Lazio vs. Lecce - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Serie A clash between Lazio and Lecce, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
